/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ClientForFrame.dir/ClientForFrame_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClientForFrame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ClientForFrame.dir/src/ClientMainWidget.cpp.o -o ../bin/ClientForFrame.app/Contents/MacOS/ClientForFrame -F/usr/local/Qt-6.8.1/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Qt-6.8.1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/chrisyan/ClientForFrameWork/build/Desktop_arm_darwin_generic_mach_o_64bit-Debug/lib /usr/local/Qt-6.8.1/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets ../lib/libPicPlayer.dylib /usr/local/Qt-6.8.1/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework OpenGL -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /usr/local/Qt-6.8.1/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
